title: Implement effective pack discovery
summary: Adds a runtime-only effective hosted-pack view that supplements valid authored registry entries with manifest-discovered bootstrap-mode packs.
scope_items: Design and implement runtime-only hosted-pack discovery that merges valid authored registry entries with discovered first-party and nested pack manifests.
Keep authored pack_registry.json as the persisted canonical surface after bootstrap.
done_when_items: Reusable-core code exposes an effective hosted-pack runtime view suitable for host discovery and selected-pack resolution.
Current WatchTowerPlan plan-pack behavior remains unchanged.
